name: Keith Keiser
description:
i thought it had been a bit since i made a bot and had some spare time and thought id try again since apparently you guys liked the last one (not to sure how) in this bot i based it off of the image cuz i like the image... i have another bot coming out soon hope fully by the end of the month because of my lack of inspiration, this wasnt requested i just wanted to help and put out some TwoKinds bots for my favorite community because there isnt a lot of them here

feel free to dm me on discord and request a bot
